# zanit-back-to-top



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Back to top floating action button component.
Appear on scroll, givern a min height for both scroll height and page height.

## Properties

| Property          | Attribute           | Description                                                   | Type     | Default |
| ----------------- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- |
| `pageMinHeight`   | `page-min-height`   | Min page height from which the back-top button must appear.   | `number` | `1600`  |
| `scrollMinHeight` | `scroll-min-height` | Min scroll height from which the back-top button must appear. | `number` | `800`   |
